Your hospital visit, simplified

Create one Connitor profile, book appointments online, check in faster at the gate, and track every visit from a single dashboard.

Create your profileBook without profile

What would you like to do?

Choose your path — each option shows the steps and takes you to the right place.

Create your Connitor profile
Build a LinkedIn-style profile once — verify your email and phone, add a live photo and ID, then use it across every hospital visit.
  1. 1Enter name, mobile, and work or personal email
  2. 2Add company, role, live photo, and government ID
  3. 3Verify email and phone, then activate your account
Create your profileSign in to your profile

Built for modern hospital visits

Everything visitors need, from registration to check-out.

One profile everywhere

Pre-register once and reuse your verified profile at any connected hospital.

Book with confidence

Pick your doctor and time online. Get notified when your visit is approved.

Digital gate pass

Receive WhatsApp or SMS with your check-in OTP or QR after doctor approval.

Secure check-in

Security verifies your ID and live photo before you enter the hospital.

Your visit, step by step

From booking to check-out — tap a step to see what happens next.

View full guide

Hospital staff

Sign in with your work email and password to open your role dashboard.

Super Admin
Hospital-wide setup: chains, departments, users, and analytics.
Sign in

Dashboard: /dashboard/

Hospital Admin
Manage your hospital site: departments, users, visitors, and appointments.
Sign in

Dashboard: /dashboard/

Department Admin
Manage a clinical department, sub-sections, staff, and appointments.
Sign in

Dashboard: /dashboard/

Sub-Department Admin
Manage your section staff and monitor section appointments.
Sign in

Dashboard: /dashboard/

Staff (Doctor & clinical)
Review visitor requests, approve appointments, and track your visitors.
Sign in

Dashboard: /dashboard/

Security
Verify IDs, check visitors in with OTP, view logs, and check out.
Sign in

Dashboard: /security/dashboard/

Delivery partners

Distributors schedule inbound deliveries to hospitals. Drivers sign in to view assignments and check-in QR codes at the security gate.

Distributor
Book hospital deliveries, manage drivers and vehicles, and track shipments.
Sign in as distributor

Dashboard: /vendor/deliveries

Driver
View your delivery assignment, hospital location, and check-in QR at the gate.
Sign in as driver

Dashboard: /driver/dashboard
